model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401893761) minutes before kickoff; prediction run on confirmed lineups. 9/22 player embeddings matched, LOPSIDED across sides: Paide (home) 6/11 matched, Zira (away) only 3/11 matched.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR16 (cap-bound); heavily downsized to a EUR3 speculative stake by explicit user decision. A +34.4pp edge against a market pricing the away side at 71% implied is an extreme divergence, and Zira (away) has only 3/11 lineup players matched to any embedding -- the edge is judged to ride mostly on an almost-blind read of Zira's actual strength, not trusted value, same failure class flagged after the Klaksvik loss and the Qarabag bet #18 sizing.

excluded_legs_note: Draw (+8.5pp edge, +38.4% EV) excluded by user decision -- same Zira-unknown data problem, judged not worth a second leg here. Away win (Zira, -50.8pp edge) explicitly excluded as a clear no-bet.
data_note: 9/22 total embeddings matched, lopsided 6/11 (Paide) vs 3/11 (Zira) -- flagged as the thinnest-data bet logged so far; large model edges here should be read with extra skepticism.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs (session artifacts); bet placed at Unibet around the 16:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
settlement_note: Full Time 1-0 (ESPN event 401893761) -- Paide won. EUR3.00 @ 7.00 = EUR21.00 return, +EUR18.00 profit. The extreme edge on this thin-data (3/11 away embeddings) bet paid off, but the pre-match caveat about trusting it stands regardless of this single outcome.
